scenario: Verify the Playwright homepage loads successfully with response status below 400 and the logo is visible
preCondition: User has network access and browser is available for automation.
testSteps: Capture the HTTP response status for the page load
Verify the response status is less than 400
Verify the page logo is visible
expectedResult: The page loads successfully with response status below 400 and the logo is visible on the page.

scenario: Verify the Get Started link is visible and clickable, and navigation from it loads successfully with response status below 400
preCondition: Playwright homepage is accessible and fully loaded.
testSteps: Verify the Get Started link is visible
Capture the HTTP response status after navigation
Verify the response status is less than 400
expectedResult: Get Started link is visible and clickable, and the destination page loads successfully with response status below 400.

scenario: Verify the docs link is visible on the target page after clicking Get Started
preCondition: User has successfully navigated to the page opened by the Get Started link.
testSteps: Verify the docs link is visible on the loaded page
expectedResult: The docs link is visible on the destination page.

scenario: Verify footer selector is present on the page
testSteps: Check that the footer selector is present on the page
expectedResult: Footer selector is present on the page.

scenario: Verify searchButton selector is visible and clickable
preCondition: Page has been loaded successfully and interactive elements are available.
expectedResult: SearchButton selector is visible and clickable.
